full_text:
Lu Nüsheng
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lu Nüshengwas born in Chenliu. Believed to have lived during the time of Emperor Ming and vanished in early 190’s. Lots of mystical claims about him.
